rationale: Review summary describing the actionable inline comments; the specific inline findings are tracked separately in this ledger.
Expanded full_authorized to require the full PentestScopeAction set before that mode can run.
Changed mode authorization from any-action intersection to all-actions subset validation and added prohibited action rejection.
Changed prohibited_actions to use the PentestScopeAction literal tuple type.
Added allowed_actions to the tuple normalization validator so whitespace is normalized before literal validation.
Added CIDR-aware target matching for approved cidr scope targets using ipaddress network membership.
Added fail-closed rejection for network_attachment_ref when the approved scope has no required network attachment policy.
Changed naive expires_at handling to fail closed with scope_expiry_timezone_required instead of assuming UTC.
Automated Codex review wrapper without separate actionable feedback beyond the inline comments already tracked.
